title: Le avventure d'Alice nel paese delle meraviglie
summaries: "Le avventure d'Alice nel paese delle meraviglie" by Lewis Carroll is a novel written in 1865. It tells the story of a girl named Alice who falls through a rabbit hole into a fantastical world populated by strange anthropomorphic creatures. The tale plays with logic and is considered one of the finest examples of the literary nonsense genre. Its narrative course, structure, characters, and imagery have been enormously influential in both popular culture and literature, especially in the fantasy genre.
